decision_signals.interpretation_boundary: These metrics test spectral concentration only. They do not establish whether truncation preserves attention outputs or language-model quality.

metadata.scope: Real qwen2 decoder-only LM KV spectral capture on WikiText-2 test segments. No compressed-cache injection, perplexity, generation quality, compact payload, memory reduction, or latency claim.

sequence_variants.mean_removed: per-head, per-channel sequence mean removed before transform
